turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I need to shift my father's physiotherapy session. He has some pain and the physio himself suggested resting for a few days.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Oh understood, rest is important. Your father's name and current appointment?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Chandrakant Divekar. He has tomorrow at 10 AM with Mr. Ganesh Khot.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Shall I reschedule to next week? Mr. Khot has Monday and Wednesday mornings open.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Wednesday, next week please. Same 10 AM if possible.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: 10 AM Wednesday next week — confirmed for Chandrakant Divekar. Hope he recovers well. SMS will be sent.
